# Project Instructions Migration

This workspace has migrated project guidelines to file-based instruction files under `.github/instructions/`.

Use targeted `*.instructions.md` files for dynamic application by file pattern and task context:

- `angular-code-style.instructions.md`
- `angular-architecture.instructions.md`
- `framework-boundary.instructions.md`
- `build-and-test.instructions.md`
- `commit-message.instructions.md`

If new conventions are needed, add or update the relevant file in `.github/instructions/` instead of expanding this file.
